reviews.name: Sandra M.
reviews.text: Dr. Foti has taken care of our whole family for over 10 years. My kids love coming in, and my chronic back pain is finally under control. Truly a family-friendly practice.

reviews.name: Kevin B.
reviews.text: I walked in with a pinched nerve that had me barely able to move. Dr. Foti worked on me right away and within a few visits I was back to normal. Can't recommend him enough.

reviews.name: Lisa R.
reviews.text: Colleen's massage therapy combined with Dr. Foti's adjustments is the perfect combination. I come in every month for maintenance and feel better than I have in years.

reviews.name: Tom W.
reviews.text: As a Palmer grad himself, Dr. Foti really knows his stuff. He explained exactly what was wrong and had me feeling better after the first treatment.

reviews.name: Angela H.
reviews.text: I brought my 8-year-old daughter in for growing pains and she was so comfortable throughout the whole visit. Dr. Foti is wonderful with children.

reviews.name: Mark S.
reviews.text: After a car accident left me with whiplash, Dr. Foti got me back on track. Professional, caring, and very knowledgeable. Best chiropractor in Niles.

heroSub: Serving the Niles community for 25+ years. Same-day appointments available. Walk-ins welcome. Dr. John Foti and Colleen Pratt LMT are here to help your whole family feel better.

services.title: Chiropractic Care
services.desc: Precision spinal adjustments from a Palmer College-trained chiropractor. Relief for back pain, neck pain, headaches, and more — for the whole family.

services.title: Massage Therapy
services.desc: Colleen Pratt, LMT, provides therapeutic massage to reduce muscle tension, improve circulation, and complement your chiropractic care.

services.title: Corrective Exercises
services.desc: Customized exercise programs to strengthen your body, correct imbalances, and prevent future injury.

services.title: Lifestyle Advice
services.desc: Practical guidance on posture, nutrition, and daily habits to help you maintain the results of your care.

comboDesc: From infants to seniors, we provide gentle, effective chiropractic care for every member of your family.
conditionsDesc: From acute injuries to long-standing chronic pain, Dr. Foti has the expertise to help your whole family recover fully.
conditionsClick: ↓ Click a condition for more information
conditionsNote: We believe every patient deserves a thorough evaluation before treatment begins. Dr. Foti takes the time to understand your condition and health goals, ensuring the safest and most effective care plan for you.
approachDesc: We don't just treat the symptom. Our structured approach ensures you get better — and stay better.

phases.title: Relief Care
phases.desc: We focus on reducing your pain quickly so you can return to normal activities. Walk-ins welcome for acute pain.

phases.title: Corrective Care
phases.desc: Once pain is controlled, we address the underlying structural issues causing your problem.

phases.title: Wellness Care
phases.desc: Regular maintenance to keep your spine aligned, your body strong, and your family healthy.

phasesNote: At the end of each phase, Dr. Foti will evaluate your progress and recommend the best options to continue your care and prevent relapse.
firstVisitDesc: We want your first visit to be comfortable and productive. Here's what to expect when you come in to Advanced Chiropractic.

firstVisitSteps.title: Patient Forms
firstVisitSteps.desc: Complete health history and condition intake forms upon arrival.

firstVisitSteps.title: Consultation
firstVisitSteps.desc: Discuss your health problems, concerns, and treatment goals with Dr. Foti. The first visit is about understanding your condition and what you want to achieve.

firstVisitSteps.title: Examination
firstVisitSteps.desc: Full chiropractic exam including reflex and flexibility testing, plus neurological, orthopedic, postural, and physical assessments. Nothing is done without your consent.

firstVisitSteps.title: X-Ray Studies
firstVisitSteps.desc: If needed based on your condition, X-rays are taken to develop the most effective treatment plan and check for serious spinal conditions.

firstVisitSteps.title: Report of Findings
firstVisitSteps.desc: Dr. Foti provides a full report covering: How can he help you? How often will you need to come in? What will the cost be?

firstVisitSteps.title: Treatment
firstVisitSteps.desc: Dr. Foti will explain the most effective and suitable treatment options. You may agree to proceed with the treatment or not — the choice is entirely yours. A personalized treatment plan can only be made after the first treatment.

firstVisitSteps.title: Wellness Program
firstVisitSteps.desc: If necessary, Dr. Foti will suggest a home wellness program which may include stretching and strengthening exercises, as well as ice/heat instructions to support your recovery between visits.

pricingDesc: We believe healthcare should be accessible. Contact us for current pricing and to discuss your insurance coverage.
pricingPackageNote: We work with most major insurance providers. Call us to verify your benefits before your first visit.
paymentNote: Payment accepted: cash, check, and most major credit cards. Insurance billing available for qualifying plans.
insuranceP1: Advanced Chiropractic works with most major insurance providers including Blue Cross Blue Shield, Aetna, Cigna, United Healthcare, and Medicare. We will verify your benefits before your first appointment.
insuranceP2: Don't have insurance? Ask about our affordable cash-pay rates.
ctaP: Call us today or walk in. Dr. Foti will assess your condition and get you started on the road to recovery the same day.
aboutSubtitle: Doctor of Chiropractic · Palmer College Graduate · 25+ Years Experience
aboutP1: Dr. John Foti earned his Doctor of Chiropractic degree from Palmer College of Chiropractic — the birthplace of chiropractic — and has been serving the Niles community since 1998. His dedication to family wellness has made Advanced Chiropractic a trusted name in Southwest Michigan.
aboutP2: Dr. Foti believes in whole-family chiropractic care, treating patients of all ages from newborns to seniors. His approach combines precise spinal adjustments with corrective exercises and lifestyle coaching, supported by Colleen Pratt LMT's therapeutic massage therapy.

faqs.a: Yes, walk-ins are welcome for acute pain and most conditions. Same-day appointments are available — call ahead when possible.
Absolutely. Dr. Foti sees patients of all ages, including infants and children. Techniques are gentle and age-appropriate.

faqs.q: How many visits will I need?
faqs.a: After your first exam, Dr. Foti will outline a clear care plan. Most acute conditions respond well in 6–10 visits.
Yes, we work with most major insurance plans. Call us to verify your coverage before your first appointment.

bookingDesc: Call us or walk in — same-day appointments available for most conditions.
